seoTitle: Embed Google Sheets in a Google Sites Website
metaDescription: Learn how to embed Google Sheets into a Google Sites website so visitors see live, automatically updated data without leaving your page.
intro: Embedding a live spreadsheet into your website lets visitors see up-to-date information without you having to manually update the page each time. This guide covers how to embed Google Sheets in a Google Sites website, a beginner-friendly way to add dynamic, data-driven content to your site.

steps.heading: Understand how Google Sheets and Google Sites work together
steps.body: Google Sites supports embedding content from other Google Workspace apps, which lets you display a live view of your spreadsheet directly on a page.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step embedding process
steps.body: Insert the Sheets embed into your Google Sites page so the data appears seamlessly within your website layout.

steps.heading: Customize the embedded view
steps.body: Adjust what visitors see, such as a specific range or tab, so only the relevant data is displayed on your page.

steps.heading: Use automation for business reporting
steps.body: Because the embed pulls live data, updates you make in Sheets appear automatically on your site without republishing the page.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues
steps.body: If the embedded sheet doesn't display correctly, check sharing permissions and embed settings, which are the most common causes of issues.

faq.question: Does the embedded sheet update automatically on my website?
faq.answer: Yes, one of the main benefits of embedding is that updates made in the spreadsheet reflect on your site automatically, ensuring visitors always see the latest information.

faq.question: Can I customize which part of the sheet is shown?
faq.answer: Yes, you can customize the embedded view to show a specific range or tab rather than the entire spreadsheet.

faq.question: Is this good for educators sharing interactive worksheets?
faq.answer: Yes, it's a common use case, letting educators share live, interactive data with students directly on a website.

faq.question: What if the embed isn't showing up correctly?
faq.answer: Sharing permissions on the sheet are a common cause of embed issues, so make sure the sheet is shared appropriately before troubleshooting further.
